title: Convert man page to markdown format
body:
Markdown formatted to render in a readable fashion using go-md2man.

Fixes #151 

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce jhonce@redhat.com

comments.body:
@mtrmac Please review, thanks.

@lsm5 Please review for packaging changes, thanks.

Nice work @jwhonce, my bigger problem with these man pages is the lack of examples.  I desperately want to know how to use skopeo, but I have a real problem translating this man pages into real use cases.  I think adding three or four use cases to the man page would be really helpful.

For future reference, this now also adds (great!) examples.

@jwhonce I’m done with my fit of being pedantic (and please feel free to tell me to shut up about such unimportant matters); the only real blocker from my POV is the `make install` update.

@mtrmac  I'm learning how to get markdown and the man pages to both render well.  So a pedantic pass isn't bad. :)  @lsm5 has a commit for the `make install`  I'll pull that in once I've cleaned up your comments.

The move from `man/` to `docs/` is breaking CAHC builds: https://ci.centos.org/job/atomic-rdgo-centos7/4446/console

> 13:42:49 install: cannot stat 'docs/skopeo.1': No such file or directory
> 13:42:49 make: **\* [install-docs] Error 1

Could someone make the corresponding change as well on the skopeo spec file: http://pkgs.fedoraproject.org/cgit/rpms/skopeo.git/tree/skopeo.spec#n200
http://pkgs.fedoraproject.org/cgit/rpms/skopeo.git/tree/skopeo.spec#n262

@jwhonce It seems that `install-docs` would benefit from a dependency on `docs/skopeo.1` (and `install-binary` on a dependency on `skopeo`?).  I’ve also been bitten by `make install` installing an obsolete version because the man format was not regenerated.

On Thu, Aug 11, 2016 at 07:14:15AM -0700, Jonathan Lebon wrote:

> The move from `man/` to `docs/` is breaking CAHC builds: https://ci.centos.org/job/atomic-rdgo-centos7/4446/console
> 
> > 13:42:49 install: cannot stat 'docs/skopeo.1': No such file or directory
> > 13:42:49 make: **\* [install-docs] Error 1
> 
> Could someone make the corresponding change as well on the skopeo spec file: http://pkgs.fedoraproject.org/cgit/rpms/skopeo.git/tree/skopeo.spec#n200
> http://pkgs.fedoraproject.org/cgit/rpms/skopeo.git/tree/skopeo.spec#n262

I'll update.

## 

Lokesh
Freenode: lsm5
GPG: 0xC7C3A0DD

> @mtrmac in rpmbuilds i'm just using lines 188-191 here: 
> Yeah, that does work, but you need to be careful and know about these things.

With ordinary GNU makefiles, `make install` alone automatically runs `make all`.

I’ll clean that up a bit.

> I’ll clean that up a bit.

#163 .
